name: Schema Documentation Update

tasks.title: Update log command design spec with duration_ms field
tasks.description: Update log command design spec with duration_ms field
tasks.body: In .wolfcastle/docs/specs/2026-03-21T18-00Z-log-command-design.md: (1) Add duration_ms to the NDJSON Records Used table for stage_complete and planning_complete rows, noting it contains pre-computed elapsed milliseconds as an integer. (2) In the Data Source section, revise the statement that no computation happens in the daemon hot path. The daemon now pre-computes duration_ms for structured consumers; renderers still own display formatting and can prefer the pre-computed value or fall back to timestamp diffs.
acceptance_criteria: NDJSON Records Used table documents the duration_ms field
Data Source section accurately reflects that the daemon emits duration_ms

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Schema Documentation Update is complete and correct

audit_enrichment: Verify the spec revision is accurate and internally consistent with the implementation

breadcrumbs.text: Updated log command design spec: added duration_ms to NDJSON Records Used table for stage_complete and planning_complete rows; revised Data Source section to reflect daemon pre-computation of duration_ms

Audit reviewed 1 file (.wolfcastle/docs/specs/2026-03-21T18-00Z-log-command-design.md, 147 lines). PASS. Task-0001 made two changes: (1) added duration_ms documentation to stage_complete and planning_complete rows in the NDJSON Records Used table, (2) revised the Data Source paragraph to reflect daemon pre-computation. Both changes verified against implementation: daemon writes duration_ms in stages.go:240, iteration.go:133, planning.go:220; logrender Record struct parses it as *int64 in record.go:21; renderers prefer it with timestamp-diff fallback in duration.go:12-18. Build passes, all tests pass (one flaky test in cmd/ is pre-existing). No gaps, no escalations.

audit.result_summary: Schema Documentation Update added duration_ms field documentation to the log command design spec. Two surgical edits to .wolfcastle/docs/specs/2026-03-21T18-00Z-log-command-design.md: the NDJSON Records Used table now documents duration_ms on stage_complete and planning_complete rows, and the Data Source section accurately reflects that the daemon pre-computes duration_ms for structured consumers while renderers own display formatting with timestamp-diff fallback. Verified against implementation in daemon (stages.go, iteration.go, planning.go) and logrender (record.go, duration.go). Clean, accurate documentation work.

task-0001.objective: Update the log command design spec to document the duration_ms field on stage_complete and planning_complete records
task-0001.what_happened: Edited two sections of .wolfcastle/docs/specs/2026-03-21T18-00Z-log-command-design.md. In the NDJSON Records Used table, added duration_ms documentation to the stage_complete and planning_complete rows. In the Data Source section, revised the claim that no computation happens in the daemon hot path to reflect that the daemon now pre-computes duration_ms for structured consumers while renderers still own display formatting.
went_well: Both edits were surgical and self-contained, no risk of drift from the implementation
improvements: None identified for a documentation-only change
action_items: If additional record types gain duration_ms in the future, update this table accordingly
